mapper.sql: cc.id, cc.client_id as clientId, cc.channel_id as channelId, cc.client_channel_number as extendNumber, cc.client_channel_price as price, cb.corpname as corpName, c.channel_name as channelName, cc.created, cc.create_id as createId, cc.updated, cc.update_id as updateId, cc.is_delete as isDelete

sql.if: and ( cb.corpname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.channel_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cc.client_channel_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: select count(1) from client_channel cc left join client_business cb on cc.client_id = cb.id and cb.is_delete = 0 left join channel c on cc.channel_id = c.id and c.is_delete = 0 where cc.is_delete = 0

select
from client_channel cc left join client_business cb on cc.client_id = cb.id and cb.is_delete = 0 left join channel c on cc.channel_id = c.id and c.is_delete = 0 where cc.id = #{id} and cc.is_delete = 0

select cc.id, cc.client_id as clientId, cc.channel_id as channelId, cc.client_channel_number as extendNumber, cc.client_channel_price as price, cc.created, cc.create_id as createId, cc.updated, cc.update_id as updateId, cc.is_delete as isDelete from client_channel cc where cc.is_delete = 0 and cc.id in
#{id}
select distinct cc.client_id from client_channel cc where cc.is_delete = 0 order by cc.client_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into client_channel
id, client_id, channel_id, client_channel_number, client_channel_price, is_available, created, create_id, updated, update_id, is_delete,
#{id}, #{clientId}, #{channelId}, #{extendNumber}, #{price}, 0, #{created}, #{createId}, #{updated}, #{updateId}, #{isDelete},
mapper.update:
update client_channel
client_id = #{clientId}, channel_id = #{channelId}, client_channel_number = #{extendNumber}, client_channel_price = #{price}, updated = #{updated}, update_id = #{updateId},
where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0

update client_channel set is_delete = 1, updated = #{updated}, update_id = #{updateId} where is_delete = 0 and id in
#{id}
